items.caption: A logo for a winery named "fruitland valley vineyard & winery." the logo includes a stylized depiction of green grapes and leaves, with the text "fruitland valley" in a cursive font above the words "vineyard & winery" in a smaller, serif font. below the name, there is additional text that reads "locally grown & produced wine" and "estb. 2012," indicating the establishment year of the winery. the background of the logo is white, and the overall design is elegant and suggests a focus on the natural origins of the wine.
